caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Increase
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing southeast winds of 16 kt with wave heights reaching 5.8 ft, while Roatan is seeing winds of 18 kt. I expect the highest impact from these conditions to be in the Eastern Caribbean, particularly in St. Thomas, where a 73% chance of rain may further exacerbate marine conditions.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing southeast winds of 20 kt and wave heights of 3.8 ft, with a high probability of rain at 95%. I expect these conditions to impact maritime activities in the Central Mediterranean, particularly in ports like Marseille, while Cadiz in the Western Mediterranean will see slightly lower winds of 19 kt.
